How To Use This Tool

  1. Paste or type your content into the word counter.
  2. Choose the format or view you want and check the live output.
  3. Copy the result or continue to a related writing or formatting tool if needed.

Example word count check

Paste a draft article or caption to measure total words, characters, sentence count, and estimated reading time in one place.

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I use the word counter?

Open the tool, enter the required inputs, and review the live result section. The how-to steps and example on this page show the fastest way to get a useful output.

Is the word counter free to use?

Yes. This word counter is designed as a free online utility on ToolHub India. You can also use the related internal links to compare other tools in the same category.
